mapper.sql: id, projectId, assetId, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, disabled, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into af_industry_asset_project_relation
projectId,
assetId,
effectiveFrom,
effectiveTo,
disabled,
createBy,
createTime,
updateBy,
updateTime,
#{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update af_industry_asset_project_relation
projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
assetId = #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update af_industry_asset_project_relation set projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, assetId = #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

trim.if: (apr.effectiveTo is null or apr.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

if.if: (apr.effectiveTo is null or apr.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

trim.if: ( apr.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or apr.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

mapper.select:
select * from af_industry_asset_project_relation as apr
apr.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
apr.projectId = #{projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
apr.assetId = #{assetId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
apr.effectiveFrom <= #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(apr.effectiveTo is null or apr.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
apr.disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
apr.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
apr.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
apr.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
apr.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select count(1) from af_industry_asset_project_relation as apr
apr.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
apr.projectId = #{projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
apr.assetId = #{assetId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
apr.effectiveFrom <= #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(apr.effectiveTo is null or apr.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
apr.disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
apr.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
apr.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
apr.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
apr.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select * from af_industry_asset_project_relation as apr
apr.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
apr.projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
apr.assetId = #{model.assetId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
apr.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(apr.effectiveTo is null or apr.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
apr.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
apr.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
apr.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
apr.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
apr.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( apr.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or apr.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select count(1) from af_industry_asset_project_relation as apr
apr.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
apr.projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
apr.assetId = #{model.assetId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
apr.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(apr.effectiveTo is null or apr.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
apr.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
apr.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
apr.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
apr.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
apr.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( apr.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or apr.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select apr.id, apr.projectId, ia.id as assetId, ia.*, ph.projectName from af_industry_asset_project_relation apr left join af_industry_asset as ia on apr.assetId = ia.id and apr.`disabled` = false and ia.`disabled` = false and IFNULL(apr.`effectiveTo`, "9999-12-31") > now() left join `pm_project_header` ph on ph.`projectId` = apr.`projectId`
ph.projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.projectName like Concat("%", #{model.projectName}, "%") AND
ph.projectType = #{model.projectType} AND
ia.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.assetNum = #{model.assetNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetName = #{model.assetName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetCategory = #{model.assetCategory, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetType = #{model.assetType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetHost = #{model.assetHost, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetOpenPorts = #{model.assetOpenPorts, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetDeployInfo = #{model.assetDeployInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetUsage = #{model.assetUsage, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.customerName = #{model.customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.industryCode = #{model.industryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetAS = #{model.assetAS, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetASVersion = #{model.assetASVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetASIdentify = #{model.assetASIdentify, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetASFramework = #{model.assetASFramework, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.middlewareName = #{model.middlewareName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.middlewareVersion = #{model.middlewareVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.developerBrand = #{model.developerBrand, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetOS = #{model.assetOS, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetOSVersion = #{model.assetOSVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetDB = #{model.assetDB, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetDBVersion = #{model.assetDBVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
ia.status = #{model.status, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.trackStatus = #{model.trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.trackedTime = #{model.trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ia.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
ia.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ia.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND apr.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(ph.effectiveTo is null or ph.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND (apr.effectiveTo is null or apr.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
( ia.assetNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetCategory like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetHost like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOpenPorts like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDeployInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetUsage like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.customerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.industryCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetAS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASIdentify like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASFramework like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.developerBrand like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOSVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDB like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDBVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by apr.projectId, apr.assetId desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from af_industry_asset_project_relation apr left join af_industry_asset as ia on apr.assetId = ia.id and apr.`disabled` = false and ia.`disabled` = false and IFNULL(apr.`effectiveTo`, "9999-12-31") > now() left join `pm_project_header` ph on ph.`projectId` = apr.`projectId`
ph.projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{model.projectName}, "%") AND
ph.projectType = #{model.projectType} AND
ia.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.assetNum = #{model.assetNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetName = #{model.assetName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetCategory = #{model.assetCategory, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetType = #{model.assetType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetHost = #{model.assetHost, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetOpenPorts = #{model.assetOpenPorts, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetDeployInfo = #{model.assetDeployInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetUsage = #{model.assetUsage, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.customerName = #{model.customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.industryCode = #{model.industryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetAS = #{model.assetAS, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetASVersion = #{model.assetASVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetASIdentify = #{model.assetASIdentify, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetASFramework = #{model.assetASFramework, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.middlewareName = #{model.middlewareName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.middlewareVersion = #{model.middlewareVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.developerBrand = #{model.developerBrand, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetOS = #{model.assetOS, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetOSVersion = #{model.assetOSVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetDB = #{model.assetDB, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.assetDBVersion = #{model.assetDBVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
ia.status = #{model.status, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.trackStatus = #{model.trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.trackedTime = #{model.trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ia.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
ia.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ia.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ia.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND apr.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(ph.effectiveTo is null or ph.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND (apr.effectiveTo is null or apr.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
( ia.assetNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetCategory like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetHost like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOpenPorts like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDeployInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetUsage like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.customerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.industryCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetAS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASIdentify like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASFramework like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.developerBrand like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOSVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDB like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDBVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
